candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Separate operating D&A line, but nothing indicates it belongs specifically to the selected COGS bucket 'Cost for Goods and Project Development'. More likely a separate operating expense line outside COGS.
Separate operating D&A line with no explicit COGS linkage; not clearly attributable to the selected COGS row.
Separate operating D&A line, but not labelled as cost of goods / cost of sales / project development. Avoid adding to COGS without explicit linkage.

variables.notes: No D&A row is explicitly tied to cost of goods / project development. The visible D&A rows appear as separate operating expense lines at the same level as overhead items, so they should not be added to COGS.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment
candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A line shown separately from the selected XSGA component rows ('Other External Costs', 'Employee Benefits Expenses', 'Other operating expenses'). Because selected XSGA rows excluded depreciation lines, this should be added separately later.
Separate operating depreciation line outside the selected XSGA component rows, so it should be added separately rather than assumed embedded in those rows.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets
candidates.why: Also an explicit operating depreciation line presented separately at the same level as the other operating expense rows. It is D&A outside the selected XSGA component bucket and should be added separately.
Separate operating D&A line, not a subcomponent of the selected XSGA rows, and no broader D&A summary row is visible that would subsume it. It should be added separately.

final_choice.row_label: Depreciation of property, plant and equipment
Depreciation of Financial Lease Right-of-Use Assets

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket consists only of 'Other External Costs', 'Employee Benefits Expenses', and 'Other operating expenses'. The statement shows multiple D&A lines separately at the same operating level, and no single visible summary row equals their total, so the separate D&A rows should be added to XSGA later. XRD is empty, so there is no separate R&D row creating a conflict.
